creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
P.S.
Try reinstalling 'rust-1.10.0' and I got the same error, 
when upgrade rust-1.9.0 to version 1.10.0!

root@vladiom:~ # portupgrade -f 'rust*' && date
[Reading data from pkg(8) ... - 1071 packages found - done]
--->  Reinstalling 'rust-1.10.0' (lang/rust)
--->  Building '/usr/ports/lang/rust'
===>  Cleaning for rust-1.10.0
===>  License APACHE20  MIT accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for rust-1.10.0
===>   rust-1.10.0 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found

===>  rust-1.10.0 conflicts with installed package(s): 
      rust-1.10.0

      They will not build together.
      Please remove them first with pkg delete.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/rust
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/rust
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade20160727-72699-1w1h6o1 env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=rust-1.10.0 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=1.10.0 make
** Fix the problem and try again.
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
	! lang/rust (rust-1.10.0)	(unknown build error)
root@vladiom:~ #
